author: Alex S
subject: ci(test-strategy): Split travis tasks (#2854)
body:
* chore(script): move conventional changelog to its own step

* chore: use build matrix

* chore: refactor CI test into 2 parts: unit and functional

Also this cleans up some other scripts:
 - validation of PR is now configurable in github
 - finish release is not used, doc is published directly and jsDeliver
 now publishes right away
